title: Dr. Swift Wrote The Following Epigram (Epigram Against Carthy)
content:
On one Delacourt's complimenting Carthy on his Poetry

    Carthy, you say, writes well - his genius true,
    You pawn your word for him - he'll vouch for you.
    So two poor knaves, who find their credit fail,
    To cheat the world, become each other's bail.
meaning:
Jonathan Swift's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Dr. Swift Wrote The Following Epigram (Epigram Against Carthy)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
